Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWNOTAS', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &FilCod.Clear() dpFilialAcesso.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.PesCod, &sdtFilialAcesso) For &sdtFilialAcessoItem in &sdtFilialAcesso &FilCod.AddItem(&sdtFilialAcessoItem.PesFilAce, &sdtFilialAcessoItem.PesFilAceNom) EndFor /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName DDO_GridColumnsSelector.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &NfeEntSai1 = nullvalue(&NfeEntSai1) &NfeRctPen1 = nullvalue(&NfeRctPen1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLIRAZ' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &NfeEntSai2 = nullvalue(&NfeEntSai2) &NfeRctPen2 = nullvalue(&NfeRctPen2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLIRAZ' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &NfeEntSai3 = nullvalue(&NfeEntSai3) &NfeRctPen3 = nullvalue(&NfeRctPen3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLIRAZ' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' &NfeEntSai4 = nullvalue(&NfeEntSai4) &NfeRctPen4 = nullvalue(&NfeRctPen4) &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFECLIRAZ' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters4' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 4, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 4, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 4, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 4, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters4.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 4, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &OqueFazerData = new() &OqueFazerDataItem = new() &OqueFazerDataItem.Title = 'Limpar Filtros' &OqueFazerDataItem.Icon = ActionCleanFilters.Link() &OqueFazerDataItem.EventKey = !'LimparFiltros' &OqueFazerDataItem.IsDivider = False &OqueFazerData.Add(&OqueFazerDataItem) &OqueFazerDataItem = new() &OqueFazerDataItem.Title = 'Reenviar' &OqueFazerDataItem.Icon = Btn_IconRefresh.Link() &OqueFazerDataItem.EventKey = !'Reenvio' &OqueFazerDataItem.IsDivider = False &OqueFazerData.Add(&OqueFazerDataItem) If (&Context.PesCod < 0) &OqueFazerDataItem = new() &OqueFazerDataItem.Title = 'Importar XMLs' &OqueFazerDataItem.Icon = PromptMultipleSelection.Link() &OqueFazerDataItem.EventKey = !'ImportarXml' &OqueFazerDataItem.IsDivider = False &OqueFazerData.Add(&OqueFazerDataItem) Endif &OqueFazerDataItem = new() &OqueFazerDataItem.Title = 'Imp.XML' &OqueFazerDataItem.Icon = PromptMultipleSelection.Link() &OqueFazerDataItem.EventKey = !'ImpXML' &OqueFazerDataItem.IsDivider = False &OqueFazerData.Add(&OqueFazerDataItem) If (&Context.PesCod < 0) &OqueFazerDataItem = new() &OqueFazerDataItem.Title = 'Importar Romaneio' &OqueFazerDataItem.Icon = PromptMultipleSelection.Link() &OqueFazerDataItem.EventKey = !'ImportarRomaneio' &OqueFazerDataItem.IsDivider = False &OqueFazerData.Add(&OqueFazerDataItem) Endif &OqueFazerDataItem = new() &OqueFazerDataItem.Title = 'WWP_ExportCaption' &OqueFazerDataItem.Icon = ActionExport.Link() &OqueFazerDataItem.EventKey = !'Export' &OqueFazerDataItem.IsDivider = False &OqueFazerData.Add(&OqueFazerDataItem) &OqueFazerDataItem = new() &OqueFazerDataItem.Title = 'WWP_ExportReportCaption' &OqueFazerDataItem.Icon = ActionExportReport.Link() &OqueFazerDataItem.EventKey = !'ExportReport' &OqueFazerDataItem.IsDivider = False &OqueFazerData.Add(&OqueFazerDataItem) &NfeProTer = nullvalue(&NfeProTer) &NfeSts = nullvalue(&NfeSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Lançamento Notas Fiscais' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() DDO_GridColumnsSelector.TitleControlIdToReplace = BtnEditColumns.InternalName GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ RetornaExisteRotina.Call(&Context.EmpCod, 'WWNOTASTERCEIROS.ASPX', &IsExiteNotasTerceiros) if &IsExiteNotasTerceiros = true //Se existe nao precisa disso. &NfeProTer = nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA tbNotaTerceiros.Visible = 0 Endif If &NfeDtaEms_To.IsEmpty() &NfeDtaEms_To = serverdate() &NfeDtaEms = &NfeDtaEms_To - 2 EndIF EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' If &Session.Get(!'wwNotasColumnsSelector') <> '' &ColumnsSelectorXML = &Session.Get(!'wwNotasColumnsSelector') &ColumnsSelector.FromXml(&ColumnsSelectorXML) Else Do 'InitializeColumnsSelector' EndIf FilCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(1).IsVisible NfeCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(2).IsVisible NfeNum.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(3).IsVisible NfePedCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(4).IsVisible NfeDtaEms.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(5).IsVisible &GridNfeCliRaz.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(6).IsVisible NfeVlrTot.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(7).IsVisible NfeSts.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(8).IsVisible NfeEntSai.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(9).IsVisible &gridNfeLctNom.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(10).IsVisible NfeChv.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(11).IsVisible NfeCliCidUF.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(12).IsVisible NfeDadAdi.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(13).IsVisible &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount NfeSts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' NfeEntSai.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &bewupdate = !'' &sdsd.Clear() &sdsd.AddItem(0, 'O que Fazer') If (NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA and NfeSts = Status_NFe.Digitando) &sdsd.AddItem(1, 'Reenviar') Endif If (NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA and not NfeNum.IsEmpty()) &sdsd.AddItem(2, 'Consultar') Endif If (NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA and NfeSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada) &sdsd.AddItem(3, 'Cancelar') Endif If (NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA and NfeSts = Status_NFe.Digitando and not NfeNum.IsEmpty()) &sdsd.AddItem(4, 'Inutilizar') Endif If (&AutNiv > 2) &sdsd.AddItem(5, 'Clonar') Endif If (NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA and NfeSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada) &sdsd.AddItem(6, 'Carta Correção') Endif If (NfeCliCidUF in ('AM','AP','AC','RO','RR') and Not NfeNum.IsEmpty()) &sdsd.AddItem(7, 'Gerar Suframa') Endif If (NfeSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada) &sdsd.AddItem(8, 'Emitir MDF-e') Endif If (not NfeChv.IsEmpty()) &sdsd.AddItem(9, 'Baixar XML') Endif If (NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA) &sdsd.AddItem(10, 'Log Erros') Endif If ((NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.TERCEIROS and &AutNiv > 2) or (NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA and (&AutNiv > 3 or NfeNum.IsEmpty()))) &sdsd.AddItem(11, 'Excluir') Endif If (NfeSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada and NfeRctPen = 'S') &sdsd.AddItem(12, 'Emitir Receita') Endif If &sdsd.Count = 1 &sdsd.Class = !'Invisible' Else &sdsd.Class = !'Attribute' EndIf &EnviarEmail = !'' If ((NfeSts <> Status_NFe.Digitando and NfeSts <> Status_NFe.Inutilizada) and NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA) &EnviarEmail.Class = !'Attribute' Else &EnviarEmail.Class = !'Invisible' Endif &ImprimirDanfe = !'' If ((NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA) or (NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.TERCEIROS and not NfeArqXml.IsEmpty())) &ImprimirDanfe.Class = !'Attribute' Else &ImprimirDanfe.Class = !'Invisible' Endif if NfeCliRaz.Length() > 40 &gridNfeCliRaz = substr(upper(NfeCliCodRaz),1,45) + '...' Else &gridNfeCliRaz = NfeCliCodRaz EndIF &gridNfeLctNom = trim(str(NfeLctCod)) + '-'+ Substr(NfeLctNom, 1, 15) Do Case Case NfeSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada and NfeRctPen = Status_SimNao.Sim &GridBadge = format(!"", "NF-e Pendente de Receituário") Otherwise &GridBadge = '' EndCase Do Case Case NfeSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada NfeSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case NfeSts = Status_NFe.Cancelada NfeSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Case NfeSts = Status_NFe.Denegada NfeSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Case NfeSts = Status_NFe.Inutilizada NfeSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Otherwise NfeSts.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' EndCase Do Case Case NfeEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada NfeEntSai.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Case NfeEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida NfeEntSai.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Otherwise NfeEntSai.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_GridColumnsSelector.OnColumnsChanged if 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelectorXML = DDO_GridColumnsSelector.ColumnsSelectorValues &ColumnsSelector.FromJson(&ColumnsSelectorXML) SaveColumnsSelectorState(!'wwNotasColumnsSelector', &ColumnsSelector.ToXml()) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else &ColumnsSelectorXML = DDO_GridColumnsSelector.ColumnsSelectorValues &ColumnsSelector.FromJson(&ColumnsSelectorXML) SaveColumnsSelectorState.Call(!'WWNotasColumnsSelector', &ColumnsSelector.ToXml()) Refresh EndIf EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled4 = True AddDynamicFilters3.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters3.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters4' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled4 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector4.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters4' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &sdsd.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &sdsd = 1 Do 'Do ReinviarNota' Case &sdsd = 2 Do 'Do ConsultarSefaz' Case &sdsd = 3 Do 'Do CancelarNota' Case &sdsd = 4 Do 'Do InutilizarNumero' Case &sdsd = 5 Do 'Do ClonarNFe' Case &sdsd = 6 Do 'Do CartaCorrecao' Case &sdsd = 7 Do 'Do GeraSuframa' Case &sdsd = 8 Do 'Do MDFE' Case &sdsd = 9 Do 'Do ExportarXML' Case &sdsd = 10 Do 'Do ConsultarStatus' Case &sdsd = 11 Do 'Do ExcluirNFe' Case &sdsd = 12 Do 'Do Receita' EndCase &sdsd = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' if &AutNiv > 2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpNota.Call('', '', false) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else msg('Você não possui Nivel 3, com o Nível 2 somente podera editar as NFEs!') Endif EndEvent Event ddo_OqueFazer.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case ddo_OqueFazer.ActiveEventKey = !'LimparFiltros' Do 'Do LimparFiltros' Case ddo_OqueFazer.ActiveEventKey = !'Reenvio' Do 'Do Reenvio' Case ddo_OqueFazer.ActiveEventKey = !'ImportarXml' Do 'Do ImportarXml' Case ddo_OqueFazer.ActiveEventKey = !'ImpXML' Do 'Do ImpXML' Case ddo_OqueFazer.ActiveEventKey = !'ImportarRomaneio' Do 'Do ImportarRomaneio' Case ddo_OqueFazer.ActiveEventKey = !'Export' Do 'DoExport' Case ddo_OqueFazer.ActiveEventKey = !'ExportReport' Do 'DoExportReport' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAjuda' innewWindow.Target = 'https://ajuda.jaspi.com.br/index.aspx?31667cb7-e069-426f-80ec-4acad1765b13' inNewWindow.Name = '_blank' innewWindow.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'InitializeColumnsSelector' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelector = new WWPColumnsSelector() WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"FilCod", '', !'Filial', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfeCod", '', !'Seq.', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfeNum", '', !'Nº NF', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfePedCod", '', !'Pedido', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfeDtaEms", '', !'Emissão', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&GridNfeCliRaz", '', !'Razão/Nome', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfeVlrTot", '', !'Valor NF', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfeSts", '', !'Status', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfeEntSai", '', !'Tipo', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridNfeLctNom", '', !'Tipo Lcto.', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfeChv", '', !'Chave NFE', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfeCliCidUF", '', !'UF', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NfeDadAdi", '', !'Adicionais', False, '') &UserCustomValue = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(!'wwNotasColumnsSelector') If not(&UserCustomValue.IsEmpty()) &ColumnsSelectorAux.FromXml(&UserCustomValue) WWP_ColumnSelector_UpdateColumns(&ColumnsSelectorAux, &ColumnsSelector) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &NfeCliRaz1.Visible = False &NfeCliCod1.Visible = False &NfeEntSai1.Visible = False &NfeCliCnpj1.Visible = False &NfeVlrTot1.Visible = False &NfeLctCod1.Visible = False &NfeCliCidUF1.Visible = False &NfeRctPen1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLIRAZ' &NfeCliRaz1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICOD' &NfeCliCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFEENTSAI' &NfeEntSai1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICNPJ' &NfeCliCnpj1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFEVLRTOT' &NfeVlrTot1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFELCTCOD' &NfeLctCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICIDUF' &NfeCliCidUF1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFERCTPEN' &NfeRctPen1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &NfeCliRaz2.Visible = False &NfeCliCod2.Visible = False &NfeEntSai2.Visible = False &NfeCliCnpj2.Visible = False &NfeVlrTot2.Visible = False &NfeLctCod2.Visible = False &NfeCliCidUF2.Visible = False &NfeRctPen2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLIRAZ' &NfeCliRaz2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLICOD' &NfeCliCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFEENTSAI' &NfeEntSai2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLICNPJ' &NfeCliCnpj2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFEVLRTOT' &NfeVlrTot2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFELCTCOD' &NfeLctCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLICIDUF' &NfeCliCidUF2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFERCTPEN' &NfeRctPen2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &NfeCliRaz3.Visible = False &NfeCliCod3.Visible = False &NfeEntSai3.Visible = False &NfeCliCnpj3.Visible = False &NfeVlrTot3.Visible = False &NfeLctCod3.Visible = False &NfeCliCidUF3.Visible = False &NfeRctPen3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLIRAZ' &NfeCliRaz3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLICOD' &NfeCliCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFEENTSAI' &NfeEntSai3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLICNPJ' &NfeCliCnpj3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFEVLRTOT' &NfeVlrTot3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFELCTCOD' &NfeLctCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLICIDUF' &NfeCliCidUF3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFERCTPEN' &NfeRctPen3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters4' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &NfeCliRaz4.Visible = False &NfeCliCod4.Visible = False &NfeEntSai4.Visible = False &NfeCliCnpj4.Visible = False &NfeVlrTot4.Visible = False &NfeLctCod4.Visible = False &NfeCliCidUF4.Visible = False &NfeRctPen4.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFECLIRAZ' &NfeCliRaz4.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFECLICOD' &NfeCliCod4.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFEENTSAI' &NfeEntSai4.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFECLICNPJ' &NfeCliCnpj4.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFEVLRTOT' &NfeVlrTot4.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFELCTCOD' &NfeLctCod4.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFECLICIDUF' &NfeCliCidUF4.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFERCTPEN' &NfeRctPen4.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLIRAZ' &NfeCliRaz2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLIRAZ' &NfeCliRaz3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' &DynamicFiltersEnabled4 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFECLIRAZ' &NfeCliRaz4.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters4' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ReinviarNota' Do Case Case NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.TERCEIROS &Mensagem = 'NFe Nº:' +trim(str(NfeNum))+ ' Filial:' +trim(str(FilCod))+ ' é uma NF de TERCEIROS e NÃO pode ser mais retransmitida!' msg(&Mensagem) Case NfeSts = Status_NFe.Digitando ValidaSchemaNFe.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod,&Context.FilCod, &Mensagem) if &Mensagem.IsEmpty() GeraXmlNFeModelo55_4.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, 'S', &Context.PesCod, 'E', &SolCod) wpAutorizaNotaRecepcao.Link('', EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, &SolCod) Else msg(&Mensagem) EndIF Otherwise &Mensagem = 'NFe Nº:' +trim(str(NfeNum))+ ' Filial:' +trim(str(FilCod))+ ' Encontra-se com Status de ' + NfeSts.EnumerationDescription() + ' e NÃO pode ser mais retransmitida!' msg(&Mensagem) Endcase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ConsultarSefaz' GravaConsultaSEFAZ.Call('WWNOTAS', EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, &Context.PesCod, &SolCod) wpConsultaSefazNota.Link('WWNOTAS', EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, &SolCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do CancelarNota' If NfeSts <> Status_NFe.Autorizada msg('ATENÇÃO, Somente Notas Autorizadas podem ser Canceladas!') Else wpCancelaNotaFiscal.Link('WWNOTAS', EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod) EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do InutilizarNumero' if NfeSts <> Status_NFe.Digitando msg('Notas Fiscais com Status Diferente de Digitando, não podem ser inutilizadas!') Else wpInutilizaNumero.Link('WWNOTAS', FilCod, NfeNum, NfeSer, ModCod) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ClonarNFe' wpClonarNFe.Link('WWNOTAS', EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do CartaCorrecao' Do Case Case NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.TERCEIROS msg('Somete NFe de Emissão Própria, que pode emitir CCe') Case NfeSts <> Status_NFe.Autorizada msg('Somente NFe Autorizadas que podem emitir CCe') Otherwise wpCartasCorrecao.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do GeraSuframa' wpGerarSuframa.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do MDFE' ValidaNfeMdfe.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod,&IsAchou) If &IsAchou = False /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ GravaMdfe_Nfe.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, &MdfeCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &WebSession.Remove('WPMDFE01_Data') &MdfWizardData.Mdfe.EmpCod = EmpCod &MdfWizardData.Mdfe.FilCod = FilCod &MdfWizardData.Mdfe.MdfeCod = &MdfeCod &WebSession.Set('WPMDFE01_Data', &MdfWizardData.ToJson()) wpMDFe01.Call('', 'Mdfe', false) Else Msg('ATENÇÃO! Já existe um MDFe com status AUTORIZADO utilizando esta NF-e, verifique e adicione um MDFe pelo monitora.') EndIf EndSub Sub 'Do ExportarXML' &NfeArqXml = RetornaXmlNota.udp(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod) if &NfeArqXml.IsEmpty() GeraXmlNFeModelo55_4.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, 'N', &Context.PesCod, 'E', &SolCod) EndIF retornaConfiguracoesPastas.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, &sdtConfiguracoesPasta) &Nome_arquivo = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempFis.Trim() +NfeChv+ '.xml' &XmlWriter.Open(&Nome_arquivo) &XmlWriter.WriteRawText(&NfeArqXml) &XmlWriter.Close() &Nome_arquivo = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempVir.Trim() +NfeChv+'.xml' Link(&Nome_arquivo) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ConsultarStatus' wpSolicitacoesNF.Popup('NOTA', EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ExcluirNFe' wpExcluirNFe.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Receita' &WebSession.Remove('WPReceituario_Data') &WizardDataReceita.Cliente.RctOciCod = NfePedCod &WizardDataReceita.Cliente.RctOciFilCod = NfeFilCod &WebSession.Set('WPReceituario_Data', &WizardDataReceita.ToJson()) WPReceituario.link('', 'Cliente', false) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do LimparFiltros' &NfeNum.SetEmpty() &NfePedCod.SetEmpty() &NfeCod.SetEmpty() &NfeProTer.SetEmpty() &ModCod.SetEmpty() &NfeSts.SetEmpty() &NfeCliRaz1.SetEmpty() &NfeCliRaz2.SetEmpty() &NfeCliRaz3.SetEmpty() &NfeCliRaz4.SetEmpty() &NfeCliCod1.SetEmpty() &NfeCliCod2.SetEmpty() &NfeCliCod3.SetEmpty() &NfeCliCod4.SetEmpty() &NfeEntSai1.SetEmpty() &NfeEntSai2.SetEmpty() &NfeEntSai3.SetEmpty() &NfeEntSai4.SetEmpty() grid.Refresh() msg('Filtros zerados! Exceto data de emissão') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Reenvio' wpRetransmitirNotas.Popup() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ImportarXml' wpImportaXmlNFe.Link('WWNOTAS', 0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ImpXML' &WebSession.Remove('ImportarXmlCompra_Data') &WizardDataIMp.SelecionarXML.DeOndeVem = 'WWNOTAS' &WebSession.Set('ImportarXmlCompra_Data', &WizardDataIMp.ToJson()) IMportarXmlCompra.Link('SelecionarXML','SelecionarXML', false) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ImportarRomaneio' wpImportaRomaneio.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFENUM" &NfeNum.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFEPEDCOD" &NfePedCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFECOD" &NfeCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFEPROTER" &NfeProTer.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"MODCOD" &ModCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILCOD" &FilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFEDTAEMS" &NfeDtaEms.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &NfeDtaEms_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFESTS" &NfeSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ if &FilCod.IsEmpty() &FilCod = &Context.FilCod Endif EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters3.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters3.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLIRAZ' &NfeCliRaz1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICOD' &NfeCliCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFEENTSAI' &NfeEntSai1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICNPJ' &NfeCliCnpj1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFEVLRTOT' &NfeVlrTot1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFELCTCOD' &NfeLctCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICIDUF' &NfeCliCidUF1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFERCTPEN' &NfeRctPen1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' &FiltroKey = 'FLT#WWNotasColumnsSelector' &UmZero = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(&FiltroKey) Do CAse Case &UmZero = '2' &SalvarFiltro = false Case &UmZero = '1' &SalvarFiltro = true Otherwise RetornaConfUsuario.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.PesCod, domConfUsuario.Uconf001_PadraoFiltro, &UmZero) if &UmZero = '2' &SalvarFiltro = false Else &SalvarFiltro = true EndiF EndCase if &SalvarFiltro = true /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NFENUM", "", not &NfeNum.IsEmpty(), 0, &NfeNum.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NFEPEDCOD", "", not &NfePedCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &NfePedCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NFECOD", "", not &NfeCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &NfeCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NFEPROTER", "", not &NfeProTer.IsEmpty(), 0, &NfeProTer, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"MODCOD", "", not &ModCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &ModCod, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILCOD", "", not &FilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NFEDTAEMS", "", not (&NfeDtaEms.IsEmpty() AND &NfeDtaEms_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &NfeDtaEms.ToString().Trim(), &NfeDtaEms_To.ToString().Trim()) WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NFESTS", "", not &NfeSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &NfeSts, '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndIF EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLIRAZ' AND not &NfeCliRaz1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliRaz1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFEENTSAI' AND not &NfeEntSai1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeEntSai1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICNPJ' AND not &NfeCliCnpj1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliCnpj1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFEVLRTOT' AND not &NfeVlrTot1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeVlrTot1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFELCTCOD' AND not &NfeLctCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeLctCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFECLICIDUF' AND not &NfeCliCidUF1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliCidUF1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NFERCTPEN' AND not &NfeRctPen1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeRctPen1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLIRAZ' AND not &NfeCliRaz2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliRaz2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLICOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFEENTSAI' AND not &NfeEntSai2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeEntSai2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLICNPJ' AND not &NfeCliCnpj2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliCnpj2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFEVLRTOT' AND not &NfeVlrTot2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeVlrTot2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFELCTCOD' AND not &NfeLctCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeLctCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFECLICIDUF' AND not &NfeCliCidUF2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliCidUF2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NFERCTPEN' AND not &NfeRctPen2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeRctPen2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLIRAZ' AND not &NfeCliRaz3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliRaz3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLICOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFEENTSAI' AND not &NfeEntSai3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeEntSai3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLICNPJ' AND not &NfeCliCnpj3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliCnpj3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFEVLRTOT' AND not &NfeVlrTot3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeVlrTot3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFELCTCOD' AND not &NfeLctCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeLctCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFECLICIDUF' AND not &NfeCliCidUF3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliCidUF3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NFERCTPEN' AND not &NfeRctPen3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeRctPen3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled4 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector4 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFECLIRAZ' AND not &NfeCliRaz4.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliRaz4.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFECLICOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliCod4.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFEENTSAI' AND not &NfeEntSai4.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeEntSai4.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFECLICNPJ' AND not &NfeCliCnpj4.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliCnpj4.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFEVLRTOT' AND not &NfeVlrTot4.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeVlrTot4.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFELCTCOD' AND not &NfeLctCod4.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeLctCod4.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFECLICIDUF' AND not &NfeCliCidUF4.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeCliCidUF4.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'NFERCTPEN' AND not &NfeRctPen4.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NfeRctPen4.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Notas" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportwwNotas.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'DoExportReport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate PDF file. Do 'LoadGridState' InNewWindow1.Target = ExportReportwwNotas.Link() InNewWindow1.Height = !'600' InNewWindow1.Width = !'800' InNewWindow1.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event grid.Refresh &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount EndEvent Event &ImprimirDanfe.Click &NfeArqXml = RetornaXmlNota.udp(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod) if &NfeArqXml.IsEmpty() GeraXmlNFeModelo55_4.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, 'N', &Context.PesCod, 'E', &SolCod) EndIF GeraPdfDanfe.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, &UrlPDF, &UrlFisico) RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = Link(&UrlPDF) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) EndEvent Event &EnviarEmail.Click If not NfeSts in (Status_NFe.Digitando, Status_NFe.Inutilizada) and NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA wpEnviaNF.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod) Refresh Else msg('Só é possível o Envio de Notas Fiscais Próprias, AUTORIZADAS, CANCELADAS, DENEGADAS') EndIF EndEvent Event &bewupdate.Click &WizardData.Capa.FilCod = FilCod &WizardData.Capa.NfeCod = NfeCod &WizardData.Capa.EmpCod = EmpCod //&WizardData.Capa.SolCod = 0 &WebSession.Set('wpNota_Data', &WizardData.ToJson()) wpNota.Link('', 'Capa', false) EndEvent

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
